def process_order(order_id: int) -> dict:
    import logging

    logger = logging.getLogger("order_processor")
    logger.info(f"Processing order {order_id}")

    order = fetch_order(order_id)
    validated = validate_order(order)
    return submit_order(validated)


def send_notification(user_id: int, message: str) -> None:
    import logging

    logger = logging.getLogger("notifier")
    logger.info(f"Sending notification to {user_id}")

    user = get_user(user_id)
    if user.email:
        email_client.send(user.email, message)


def sync_inventory(product_ids: list[int]) -> None:
    import logging

    logger = logging.getLogger("inventory_sync")
    for pid in product_ids:
        logger.debug(f"Syncing product {pid}")
        update_stock(pid)
